features: Specially designed to protect teeth against acids from sugars in everyday food
Sugar free toothpastes with mild flavours
description: Product Description Oral-B Kids 3-5 Years Toothpastes are specially designed to protect teeth against acids from sugars in everyday food. For healthy and strong teeth, these sugar free toothpastes with mild flavours are specially designed for kids. Ingredients Sorbitol, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Trisodium Phosphate, Aroma, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Phosphate, Sodium Saccharin, Carbomer, Sodium Fluoride, Limonene, Polysorbate 80, Sodium Hydroxide, CI 42090. Directions 1. Wet the toothbrush. 2. Squeeze a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto the toothbrush. 3. Brush all surfaces of the teeth in a circular motion. 4. Brush the tongue and roof of the mouth. 5. Rinse thoroughly with water. 6. Repeat twice a day. Safety Warning Useful exclusion. Avoid swallowing. Keep out of reach of children. Stop using and consulting a dentist if annoying reactions occur. See more
